## [00:00 - 03:00]

Okay, so now what we're going to do is we're going to create our Facebook ad pushing our live training that is going to come up. And so the first thing I want to do is I want to actually save this audience so that I can use it in my new campaign. So I'm going to go and open this up as an ad set and you'll see it will look something like the normal audience and you'll see a button to click save audience. Just give it a name so that you can access it later. The other thing I want to do is I want to preview the winning ads so the ad that got me the best results from my second round of rapid fire testing. And once I've done that, I'm going to go back at the campaign level and I'm going to create a campaign. So I've already named one here. You might do stage one here as well. And because this is sending people to many chat, I'm going to set this up as a traffic objective campaign. But if you were activating a funnel, an evergreen funnel, you'd probably set this up as a conversion optimization. So at my ad set level, I'm basically using the same exact targeting that I used in my second round of rapid fire testing. Pretty much everything is set to the default. I've got a fairly small budget. And then because it's a traffic objective campaign, I've removed audience network and messenger as well, because those can have some funny traffic quality issues sometimes with them. So I'm keeping it mostly to the feeds as well as Instagram. So I'm going to click publish. Okay, now at the ad, what I want to do is I actually want to recreate this ad as closely as possible. So I'm going to copy this here. I'm going to select my image, paste my text in. I can edit this in a moment. I also want to grab the copy from my, the link for my training. So this is under the setup. You'll see here I've got this link. I'm going to copy this, go back in here and punch my URL in here. Okay, we're going to go sign up. So you're replicating this as closely as you can from your second rapid fire test. Okay, I'm going to edit this copy a bit. Okay, what I also want to do here once I've got my first, my ads running towards my live training is I want to set up the retargeting as well.

## [03:00 - 04:22]

Now we're not going to go live with this, but we just want to make sure that it's ready to go once we're ready to hit the ground running. So I'm setting this up as a post engagement objective because I'll have quite a small audience at the bottom of the funnel. There'll probably be fewer than 500 people. And so post engagement will work better here. I'm going to click edit. And what you'll notice is I've just set up a custom audience of anyone that triggered the page, that visited the website basically. So remember we put a pixel on here. Unfortunately, it's not a standard event. So the custom audience is just anyone that visited website in the last seven days. We're excluding people that purchased as well. And we're leaving this to all placements because it is retargeting. You'll see here inside of our campaign, I've already set up a retargeting ad. And in fact, here it is over here. So basically what I'm doing here is just doors closing. I've got some urgency, call to action, sign up. And then I've relisted some of the benefits or impact. I'm going live with this the moment that I finish the live training because people will be visiting the sales page and they need to get retargeted with this. So that's the second part of setting up your ads is to set up the retargeting for it.
